zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短期承压震荡偏弱
zh.content:
SOL当前报价68.71，位于20日均线70.12下方运行，整体结构偏弱。价格连续在68.6附近窄幅整理，反弹动能不足，短线趋势以震荡下行主导。

MACD指标当前为-1.053，空头动能占优，柱状图持续位于零轴下方，说明下跌动能仍在释放。RSI缺失但从价格结构看未进入超卖修复阶段，反弹信号不强。

下方关键支撑关注68.6与68.2区间，若跌破可能进一步回踩67.5一线。上方阻力集中在70.1与71.0附近，需放量突破才能扭转弱势结构。

操作建议以区间交易为主，未有效站上70美元前保持反弹做空思路，控制仓位防止假突破，等待趋势重新选择方向。短线波动较大需谨慎操作

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US dollar is currently exhibiting a mild bearish-to-neutral structure, with price action holding near 68.71 after a marginal 24-hour decline. The market remains below the 20-period SMA at 70.12, suggesting that short-term momentum has weakened. Price is consolidating tightly near intraday lows, indicating reduced volatility but no clear reversal confirmation yet. Overall structure favors a corrective phase within a broader range rather than a trending breakout.

Momentum indicators reinforce a cautious outlook, with MACD sitting at -1.053, reflecting persistent bearish pressure. The absence of a visible signal line reading limits precision, but the negative histogram bias suggests downside momentum is still dominant. While RSI data is unavailable, price behavior near the lower intraday range implies limited bullish strength. Buyers have yet to establish consistent control, keeping momentum tilted toward consolidation or further soft downside drift.

Immediate support is found near 68.60, closely aligned with the current intraday low, making it a critical level for short-term defense. A break below this zone could expose 68.00 and potentially 67.50 as extended downside targets. On the upside, initial resistance sits at the 20-SMA around 70.12, followed by a stronger barrier near 72.00. Until price reclaims the SMA, upside attempts may face repeated rejection.

Given the prevailing range-bound structure with bearish bias, short-term traders may favor selling into resistance near the 70.00–70.20 zone while maintaining tight risk control. Long positions are only more favorable upon a sustained break above the 20-SMA with volume confirmation. Conservative stops below 68.50 help manage downside risk. Overall strategy remains tactical, prioritizing range trading over breakout positioning until momentum improves.
